zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_01: $self$觉得有些痒，忍不住缩了一下脚，但随即又把脚伸了回来，脸上带着宠溺的笑意。"真是的，你也太喜欢这里了吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_02: $self$没有抽回脚，只是把视线移向别处，耳根有些发红。"轻一点……那里很敏感的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_03: $self$用另一只脚轻轻蹭了蹭$target$的手背，像是在默许这个行为。"好吧，仅限今天哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_04: $self$整个人僵住了，眼睛瞪得大大的，似乎大脑还没处理完当前的状况。"等等……你要做什么？"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_05: $self$看着握住自己脚踝的那只手，完全忘记了反抗，只有脚趾在尴尬地抓地。"那个……我的鞋……？"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_06: $self$张了张嘴，却因为太过震惊而没能发出声音，只是呆滞地任由$target$摆布。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_07: $self$浑身颤抖着，拼命咬住嘴唇不让自己叫出声，眼泪在眼眶里打转。"求你……别这样……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_08: $self$死死抓着裙摆，不敢看$target$的眼睛，只能绝望地闭上眼。"我知道了……我不动……请快点结束……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_09: $self$的脚在$target$手里不受控制地痉挛，脸色惨白。"对不起……对不起……我听话……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_01: $self$发出含糊不清的梦呓，眉头微蹙，本能地想要把脚缩回被子里。"唔……好痒……别闹……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_02: $self$睡得很沉，只是随着动作偶尔轻微抽搐一下脚趾，呼吸依旧平稳绵长。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_03: $self$似乎在梦中感到了某种异样，不安地翻了个身，一条腿无意识地搭在了$target$身上，脚背紧绷了一瞬又松弛下来。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_01: $self$静止在半空中，没有任何反应，只有脚趾间的软肉随着$target$的动作被挤压变形。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_02: $self$维持着迈步的姿势一动不动，唯有被抚摸的足底皮肤因体温传递而微微泛红。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_03: $self$像一尊精美的人偶，毫无知觉地任由$target$将手指插入趾缝深处，连条件反射的抽动都不曾发生。
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_01: $self$触电般地收回了脚，甚至不小心踢到了$target$一下。"呀！别闹，好痒！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_02: $self$用脚趾抵住了$target$的手掌，眉头微皱。"不行，今天走了很多路，还没洗澡呢……脏。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_03: $self$灵活地把脚抽走，盘腿坐在沙发上护住了自己的脚踝。"你是变态吗？快放手啦！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_01: $self$尴尬地笑了笑，试图不动声色地把脚抽回来。"呃，这样不太好吧？我们还没熟到这种程度……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_02: $self$轻轻推了推$target$的手，语气礼貌却疏离。"那个，我不习惯别人碰我的脚，抱歉。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_03: $self$往后缩了缩身子，保持着社交距离。"这玩笑开得有点过了哦，哈哈。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_01: $self$毫不客气地一脚踹向$target$的面门，眼神冰冷。"滚开！别用你的脏手碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_02: $self$猛地站起身，一脸嫌恶地拍打着刚才被碰过的地方。"真恶心……我要报警了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_03: $self$像是看垃圾一样看着$target$，声音里充满了鄙夷。"你有病吧？离我远点！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_01: $self$原本紧绷的脚背完全放松下来，脚趾无意识地在$target$掌心微微蜷曲。"嗯……意外地……挺舒服的……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_02: $self$的呼吸变得有些急促，眼神迷离地看着$target$。"再按一下脚心……对，就是那里……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_03: $self$发出一声轻哼，主动把另一只脚也递了过来。"这边也要……不能偏心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_01: $self$原本抗拒的挣扎渐渐停止了，脸颊染上一层不自然的绯红，喘息声变得沉重。"奇、奇怪……为什么会……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_02: $self$咬着手指，眼神变得有些涣散，原本推拒的手无力地垂下。"哈啊……不管了……随你便吧……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_03: $self$羞耻地捂住脸，但脚趾却诚实地夹住了$target$的手指。"别看我……呜……只有脚……舒服……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_01: $self$猛地抽回脚，有些恼火地瞪着$target$。"够了！一直弄那里真的很奇怪啊！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_02: $self$脸上的笑意消失了，语气变得僵硬。"我说了很痒……你听不懂吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_03: $self$烦躁地用脚背拍打了一下$target$的肩膀。"好无聊……我要去睡觉了，放开我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_01: $self$终于爆发了，歇斯底里地尖叫起来，用尽全力乱踢乱蹬。"放开我！你这个变态！疯子！！"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_02: $self$眼里的恐惧转变成了纯粹的恨意，死死盯着$target$。"我绝对……绝对不会原谅你……"
zh-cn.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_03: $self$因为极度的厌恶而干呕了一声，脸色铁青。"碰够了吗？我想吐……滚啊！"

en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_01: $self$ felt ticklish and couldn't help shrinking her foot back, but immediately extended it again with a doting smile. "Seriously, do you like this place that much?"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_02: $self$ didn't pull her foot back but looked away, the tips of her ears turning red. "Gently... it's very sensitive there."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_03: $self$ gently rubbed the back of $target$'s hand with her other foot, as if silently permitting the act. "Alright, just for today, okay?"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_04: $self$ froze completely, eyes wide open, as if her brain hadn't processed the situation yet. "Wait... what are you doing?"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_05: $self$ stared at the hand gripping her ankle, completely forgetting to resist, only her toes curling awkwardly on the ground. "Umm... my shoes...?"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_06: $self$ opened her mouth but was too shocked to make a sound, simply staring blankly as $target$ manipulated her foot.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_07: $self$ trembled all over, biting her lip desperately to stifle a scream, tears welling up in her eyes. "Please... don't do this..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_08: $self$ clutched her skirt tightly, not daring to look $target$ in the eyes, closing her own in despair. "I understand... I won't move... please finish quickly..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Begin_09: $self$'s foot spasmed uncontrollably in $target$'s hand, her face pale. "I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'll listen..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_01: $self$ mumbled incoherently in her sleep, frowning slightly, instinctively trying to pull her foot back under the covers. "Mmm... ticklish... stop it..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_02: $self$ slept soundly, only her toes twitching slightly with the movement, her breathing remaining steady and long.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_Sleep_03: $self$ seemed to feel something strange in her dream, turning over uneasily, one leg unconsciously draping over $target$, the arch of her foot tensing for a moment before relaxing.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_01: $self$ remained frozen in mid-air with no reaction, only the soft flesh between her toes deforming under $target$'s touch.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_02: $self$ maintained her walking pose perfectly still, only the skin on her sole turning slightly red from the warmth of the touch.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_TimeStop_03: $self$ was like an exquisite doll, feeling nothing as $target$ slid fingers deep between her toes, not even a reflex twitch occurring.
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_01: $self$ retracted her foot as if electrocuted, accidentally kicking $target$ in the process. "Eek! Stop it, it tickles!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_02: $self$ pressed her toes against $target$'s palm, frowning slightly. "No, I walked a lot today and haven't showered yet... it's dirty."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailPerm_03: $self$ nimbly pulled her foot away, sitting cross-legged on the sofa to guard her ankles. "Are you a pervert? Let go!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_01: $self$ smiled awkwardly, trying to discreetly pull her foot back. "Uh, isn't this a bit inappropriate? We aren't that close yet..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_02: $self$ gently pushed $target$'s hand away, her tone polite but distant. "Um, I'm not used to people touching my feet, sorry."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailLike_03: $self$ shrunk back, maintaining social distance. "This joke is going a bit too far, haha."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_01: $self$ unceremoniously kicked towards $target$'s face, eyes cold. "Fuck off! Don't touch me with your dirty hands!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_02: $self$ stood up abruptly, slapping the spot that was touched with a look of disgust. "Disgusting... I'm calling the police!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_FailHate_03: $self$ looked at $target$ like garbage, her voice filled with contempt. "Are you sick? Get away from me!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_01: $self$'s previously tense instep relaxed completely, her toes curling unconsciously in $target$'s palm. "Mmm... unexpectedly... it feels quite good..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_02: $self$'s breathing became somewhat rapid, looking at $target$ with hazy eyes. "Press the sole again... yes, right there..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccPerm_03: $self$ let out a soft hum, actively offering her other foot. "Here too... don't be biased."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_01: $self$'s resistance gradually ceased, her cheeks flushing an unnatural crimson, breathing becoming heavy. "S-strange... why does it..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_02: $self$ bit her finger, eyes losing focus as her pushing hand dropped weakly. "Haa... whatever... do as you please..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_SuccNoPerm_03: $self$ covered her face in shame, but her toes honestly gripped $target$'s finger. "Don't look at me... Ugh... only the feet... feels good..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_01: $self$ jerked her foot back, glaring at $target$ with some irritation. "Enough! It's really weird to keep doing that there!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_02: $self$ stopped smiling, her tone stiffening. "I said it tickles... don't you understand?"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadPerm_03: $self$ tapped $target$'s shoulder annoyedly with her foot. "So boring... I'm going to sleep, let me go."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_01: $self$ finally snapped, screaming hysterically and kicking wildly. "Let go! You pervert! Crazy!!"
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_02: $self$'s fear turned into pure hatred, staring deathly at $target$. "I will absolutely... never forgive you..."
en-us.com_touch_foot_toes_BadNoPerm_03: $self$ retched from extreme disgust, face pale. "Touched enough? I want to vomit... Get lost!"
